name: Mistral AI
description: Run Mistral's open-weight and commercial language models. OpenAI-compatible API format with strong multilingual performance and EU data residency.

auth.hint: Create an API key at console.mistral.ai. Free trial credits available.

tools.name: chat_completion
tools.description: Send a message to a Mistral model and get a response.

params.name: model
params.description: Model: mistral-large-latest, mistral-small-latest, mistral-7b-instruct, or codestral-latest

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List all available Mistral AI models.
